title: InventoryResize
description: The ultimate tool for server owners to customize gameplay, progression, and difficulty by taking full control over player inventory sizes.
body:
🎒 **Inventory Resize | Total Control Over Player Inventories!**
- Ever wanted to create a truly challenging survival experience? Or perhaps reward your most dedicated players with extra space? Inventory Resize is a powerful, lightweight, and easy-to-use plugin that gives you complete control over the size of your players' inventories!

Designed for modern servers, this plugin allows you to dynamically set how many inventory slots each player can access, from a single hotbar row up to the full 36 slots. It's the perfect tool for server owners who want to add a new layer of progression, difficulty, or customization to their gameplay.

✨ **Key Features**
- 📏 **Dynamic Inventory Sizing:** Change a player's inventory size on the fly with a simple command.
  
- 💻 **Powerful & Simple Commands:** Intuitive commands that are easy to remember and use. Now with Tab Completion!
  
- 🛡️ **Full Permission Control:** A single permission node gives you access to all commands, keeping your server secure. (Default: OP)
  
- ⚙️ **Highly Configurable:** Customize all plugin messages and set the default inventory size for new players directly from the config.yml.
  
- ✅ **Wide Version Support (1.13 - 1.21+):** A single plugin file works seamlessly across a huge range of modern Minecraft versions.
  
- 🔒 **Secure Slot Locking:** Players cannot bypass the slot limit by clicking or dragging items, preventing any bugs or exploits.

⌨️ **Commands**
All commands are managed through the main /isize command.

- > /isize <player> <size>
> 
> - Description: Sets the inventory size for a specific player. The size must be a multiple of 9 (e.g., 9, 18, 27, 36).

- > /isize reset <player>
> 
> - Description: Resets the player's inventory size back to the default value set in the config.yml.


- >/isize reload
>
> - Description: Reloads the configuration file without needing to restart the server.

🔑 **Permissions**
Managing the plugin is simple with just one permission node.

- > inventoryresizer.admin

> - Description: Grants access to all /isize commands.

> - Default: OP

🔧 **Configuration**
The config.yml is clean and easy to edit. You can modify all messages to match your server's theme and language!

 The default inventory size for players who haven't been assigned a custom size.
 Must be a multiple of 9 (9, 18, 27, 36).
default-size: 36

 All messages used in the plugin. Color codes (&a, &c, etc.) are supported.
messages:
  prefix: "&8[&aInvResizer&8] &r"
  reload: "&aConfig file has been successfully reloaded."
   ... and many more!

Take control of your server's gameplay experience today! Download Inventory Resizer now! 🚀


✨ **Check Out Our Other Plugins!** ✨ If you enjoy the **InventoryResize** plugin, don't forget to check out our other high-quality plugins for your server!
